courses.title: ASP.NET Core Masterclass
courses.description: Master ASP.NET Core from scratch to advanced. Build production-grade REST APIs, implement authentication, work with databases using Entity Framework Core, and deploy to the cloud. This course covers real-world scenarios and best practices used in the industry.
courses.shortDescription: Build production-grade APIs with ASP.NET Core
requirements: Visual Studio or VS Code installed
whatYouLearn: Build RESTful APIs with ASP.NET Core

lessons.title: Course Introduction
lessons.description: Overview of what we will build in this course.

lessons.title: Setting Up Your Development Environment
lessons.description: Install .NET SDK, Visual Studio, and all required tools.

lessons.title: Your First ASP.NET Core App
lessons.description: Create and run your first ASP.NET Core application.

lessons.title: Understanding REST Principles
lessons.description: Learn what REST is and the principles behind it.

lessons.title: Controllers and Routing
lessons.description: Deep dive into controllers, actions, and routing in ASP.NET Core.

lessons.title: HTTP Methods and Status Codes
lessons.description: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE — when to use each.

lessons.title: REST API Quiz
lessons.description: Test your understanding of REST API concepts.

lessons.title: Introduction to EF Core
lessons.description: What is an ORM and why use EF Core.

lessons.title: Code First Approach
lessons.description: Create your database from C# classes.

lessons.title: Migrations and Seeding
lessons.description: Manage database schema changes with migrations.

lessons.title: Querying Data with LINQ
lessons.description: Use LINQ to query your database efficiently.

lessons.title: JWT Authentication Explained
lessons.description: Understand how JWT tokens work.

lessons.title: Implementing JWT in ASP.NET Core
lessons.description: Add JWT authentication to your API step by step.

lessons.title: Role-Based Authorization
lessons.description: Restrict endpoints based on user roles.

courses.title: Clean Architecture in .NET
courses.description: Learn how to structure .NET applications using Clean Architecture principles. This course teaches you CQRS, MediatR, Repository Pattern, Unit of Work, Specification Pattern, and Domain-Driven Design with hands-on projects.
whatYouLearn: Use Repository and Unit of Work patterns

lessons.title: What is Clean Architecture?
lessons.description: Understand the layers and principles of Clean Architecture.

lessons.title: The Dependency Rule
lessons.description: Learn the most important rule in Clean Architecture.

lessons.title: Setting Up the Solution Structure
lessons.description: Create the project structure following Clean Architecture.

lessons.title: Introduction to CQRS
lessons.description: Why separate Commands from Queries.

lessons.title: Setting Up MediatR
lessons.description: Install and configure MediatR in your project.

lessons.title: Writing Your First Command
lessons.description: Create a Command, Handler, and Validator.

lessons.title: Writing Your First Query
lessons.description: Create a Query and Handler with pagination.

lessons.title: Pipeline Behaviors
lessons.description: Add logging and validation as pipeline behaviors.

lessons.title: Generic Repository Pattern
lessons.description: Build a generic repository that works with any entity.

lessons.title: Specification Pattern
lessons.description: Create reusable query specifications.

lessons.title: Unit of Work Implementation
lessons.description: Wrap multiple operations in a single transaction.

courses.title: React for Beginners
courses.description: Start your frontend journey with React. Learn components, state management, hooks, routing, and how to connect your React app to a backend API. Build real projects from scratch.
courses.shortDescription: Learn React from zero to hero
whatYouLearn: Manage state with useState and useReducer

lessons.title: What is React?
lessons.description: Introduction to React and why it exists.

lessons.title: JSX Syntax
lessons.description: Writing HTML inside JavaScript with JSX.

lessons.title: Components and Props
lessons.description: Build and reuse components with props.

lessons.title: State with useState
lessons.description: Manage component state using the useState hook.

lessons.title: useEffect Hook
lessons.description: Handle side effects in functional components.

lessons.title: useContext Hook
lessons.description: Share state across components without prop drilling.

lessons.title: Custom Hooks
lessons.description: Create your own reusable hooks.

lessons.title: Fetch API and Axios
lessons.description: Make HTTP requests from React.

lessons.title: Loading and Error States
lessons.description: Handle loading spinners and error messages.

lessons.title: Building a Full CRUD App
lessons.description: Connect to a real backend and build a complete CRUD app.

courses.title: Python for Data Science
courses.description: Learn Python specifically for data science and machine learning. Covers NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and an introduction to Scikit-learn. Work with real datasets throughout the course.
courses.shortDescription: Python, Pandas, NumPy, and ML basics

lessons.title: Python Introduction
lessons.description: Why Python for data science and setting up your environment.

lessons.title: Variables and Data Types
lessons.description: Numbers, strings, lists, dictionaries, and more.

lessons.title: Control Flow
lessons.description: If statements, loops, and functions in Python.

lessons.title: Python Quiz
lessons.description: Test your Python basics knowledge.

lessons.title: Introduction to NumPy
lessons.description: Arrays, operations, and mathematical functions.

lessons.title: Pandas DataFrames
lessons.description: Load, manipulate, and analyze data with Pandas.

lessons.title: Data Cleaning
lessons.description: Handle missing values, duplicates, and outliers.

lessons.title: Working with Real Datasets
lessons.description: Practice with real-world CSV files.

lessons.title: Matplotlib Basics
lessons.description: Create line charts, bar charts, and scatter plots.

lessons.title: Seaborn for Statistical Plots
lessons.description: Beautiful statistical visualizations with Seaborn.

courses.title: Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn
courses.description: Dive into machine learning with hands-on projects. Learn supervised and unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, and deploy your first ML model. Uses Python and Scikit-learn throughout.
requirements: Completed Python for Data Science or equivalent

lessons.title: What is Machine Learning?
lessons.description: Types of ML and real-world applications.

lessons.title: The ML Workflow
lessons.description: From data to deployed model — the full pipeline.

lessons.title: Setting Up Scikit-Learn
lessons.description: Install and configure your ML environment.

lessons.title: Linear Regression
lessons.description: Predict continuous values with linear regression.

lessons.title: Logistic Regression
lessons.description: Binary classification with logistic regression.

lessons.title: Decision Trees and Random Forests
lessons.description: Tree-based models for classification and regression.

lessons.title: Support Vector Machines
lessons.description: SVM for classification problems.

lessons.title: Train-Test Split
lessons.description: Properly evaluate your model performance.

lessons.title: Cross Validation
lessons.description: More robust model evaluation techniques.

lessons.title: Confusion Matrix and Metrics
lessons.description: Accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score explained.

courses.title: Docker and Kubernetes Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn containerization with Docker and orchestration with Kubernetes. Build, ship, and run applications in containers. Deploy to a Kubernetes cluster and manage microservices at scale.

lessons.title: What is Docker?
lessons.description: Containers vs VMs and why Docker matters.

lessons.title: Installing Docker
lessons.description: Setup Docker on Windows, Mac, and Linux.

lessons.title: Your First Container
lessons.description: Pull an image and run your first container.

lessons.title: Writing Dockerfiles
lessons.description: Create custom Docker images for your apps.

lessons.title: Docker Volumes and Networks
lessons.description: Persist data and connect containers.

lessons.title: Introduction to Docker Compose
lessons.description: Define multi-container apps with a single file.

lessons.title: Compose a Full Stack App
lessons.description: Run API, database, and frontend together.

lessons.title: Kubernetes Architecture
lessons.description: Nodes, pods, services, and deployments explained.

lessons.title: Deploying to Kubernetes
lessons.description: Deploy your first app to a K8s cluster.

lessons.title: Scaling and Load Balancing
lessons.description: Scale your app horizontally with Kubernetes.

courses.title: Introduction to Programming — Free
courses.description: A completely free introduction to programming for absolute beginners. No prior experience needed. Learn the fundamental concepts of programming using simple examples and exercises.

lessons.title: What is Programming?
lessons.description: Introduction to programming and how computers work.

lessons.title: Variables and Data Types
lessons.description: Store and manipulate data in your programs.

lessons.title: Conditions
lessons.description: Make decisions in your code with if/else.

lessons.title: Loops
lessons.description: Repeat actions with for and while loops.

lessons.title: Functions
lessons.description: Write reusable blocks of code.

courses.title: SQL and Database Design
courses.description: Learn SQL from the ground up and master database design. Write complex queries, design normalized schemas, work with stored procedures, and optimize query performance.

lessons.title: What is SQL?
lessons.description: Relational databases and SQL overview.

lessons.title: SELECT Queries
lessons.description: Retrieve data from tables with SELECT.

lessons.title: Filtering with WHERE
lessons.description: Filter results using WHERE clauses.

lessons.title: INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
lessons.description: Modify data in your database.

lessons.title: JOINs Explained
lessons.description: INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, and FULL JOINs.

lessons.title: Subqueries
lessons.description: Nest queries inside queries.

lessons.title: Aggregate Functions
lessons.description: COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX with GROUP BY.

lessons.title: SQL Performance Quiz
lessons.description: Test your advanced SQL knowledge.

lessons.title: Normalization
lessons.description: 1NF, 2NF, 3NF — design clean databases.

lessons.title: Indexes and Performance
lessons.description: Speed up queries with proper indexing.

courses.title: Entrepreneurship 101
courses.description: Start your entrepreneurial journey with this practical guide. Learn how to validate your business idea, build an MVP, find your first customers, and grow a sustainable business.

lessons.title: Identifying Problems Worth Solving
lessons.description: How to find business opportunities around you.

lessons.title: Idea Validation Framework
lessons.description: Validate your idea before building anything.

lessons.title: Competitor Analysis
lessons.description: Understand the market landscape.

lessons.title: What is an MVP?
lessons.description: Minimum Viable Product explained with examples.

lessons.title: Getting Your First Customers
lessons.description: Strategies to acquire your first 10 customers.

courses.title: Deep Learning with TensorFlow
courses.description: Go beyond traditional ML and dive into deep learning. Build neural networks from scratch, implement CNNs for image recognition, RNNs for sequence data, and deploy models to production.

lessons.title: What are Neural Networks?
lessons.description: Neurons, layers, and how networks learn.

lessons.title: Activation Functions
lessons.description: ReLU, Sigmoid, Softmax — when to use each.

lessons.title: Backpropagation
lessons.description: How neural networks actually learn.

lessons.title: Setting Up TensorFlow
lessons.description: Install TensorFlow and Keras.

lessons.title: Building Your First Neural Network
lessons.description: Sequential model with Keras step by step.

lessons.title: Training and Evaluation
lessons.description: Train, validate, and evaluate your model.

lessons.title: CNN Architecture
lessons.description: Convolution, pooling, and fully connected layers.

lessons.title: Image Classification Project
lessons.description: Build a CNN that recognizes handwritten digits.
